summary: FINRA/NYSE TRF will extend operating hours from 4am-8pm ET weekdays to 9pm Sunday–8pm Friday (with a one-hour pause) effective December 6, 2026. The Pillar FIX specifications have been updated accordingly. This change impacts trading, post-trade, and market data services, requiring connectivity adjustments for firms that report to the TRF.
